title: The Trees & The Woodman
content:
The Trees ask of Man what he lacks;
    "One bit, just to handle my axe?"
    All he asks--well and good:
    But he cuts down the wood,
    So well does he handle his axe!

    "Give Me An Inch & I'll Take An Ell"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Walter Crane delivers a powerful performance in "The Trees & The Woodman"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
